summary: Frontend testing for Users & Classes Management page - Bug fix verification for fetchTeachers error. All features working correctly: 3 action buttons visible, all wizards open/close without critical errors, tab filters work, bulk import button removed.

design_issues.screen: Add Teacher Wizard / Add Class Wizard
issues: React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - minor warning in Step1BasicInfo and Step1ClassInfo components

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add unique 'key' props to list items in AddTeacherWizard Step1BasicInfo and CreateClassWizard Step1ClassInfo to eliminate React warnings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Users & Classes Management page at /principal/users-management is only accessible to school_principal and school_sub_admin roles. Platform admin cannot access this page directly.

fetchTeachers_bug_fix.evidence: Opening and closing Add Teacher wizard does NOT cause fetchTeachers JavaScript error. The onOpenChange handler fix is working correctly.

add_student_button.evidence: Button found with data-testid='add-student-btn', opens AddStudentWizard modal successfully

add_teacher_button.evidence: Button found with data-testid='add-teacher-btn', opens AddTeacherWizard modal successfully

add_class_button.evidence: Button found with data-testid='add-class-btn', opens CreateClassWizard modal successfully

wizard_open_close.evidence: All 3 wizards (Student, Teacher, Class) can be opened and closed without critical JavaScript errors

tab_filters.evidence: All 4 tab filters (All, Students, Teachers, Classes) found and working correctly - clicking each filter shows appropriate content

bulk_import_removed.evidence: No bulk import/download buttons found on the page - correctly removed as requested

arabic_rtl_layout.evidence: Page displays correctly in Arabic RTL layout with proper text alignment and UI elements

notes: The only console errors detected are React warnings about missing 'key' props in list items - these are minor warnings and do not affect functionality. The critical fetchTeachers bug has been fixed.
